title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0094 Building 11, Explore Lane, Bristol, BS1 5TY
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Canada Life Asset Management  Site address:  Building 11, Explore Lane, Bristol, BS1 5TY  Description of proposed development:  The use of part of the roof area as an outdoor terrace, comprising the provision of a metal canopy frame with retractable sunshade, glass balustrade and acoustic screen along with the provision of biodiverse green roof to part of roof top plant room.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 19 March 2025   Date by when representations must be made 24 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 14 May 2025   Decision date 15 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of reasons  (PDF, 328 KB, 9 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 24 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0094 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     PINS1 - Letter to Planning Inspectorate - 04.03.25  (PDF, 219 KB, 3 pages)  Application Forms  (PDF, 2.13 MB, 14 pages)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-300-P01-Site Location  (PDF, 713 KB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-301-P01-Block Plan  (PDF, 1.31 MB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-302-P01-Site Plan  (PDF, 1.27 MB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-310-P01-Level 3 Mezzanine Existing  (PDF, 1 MB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-311-P01-Level 4 Existing  (PDF, 626 KB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-312-P01-Roof Plan Existing  (PDF, 361 KB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-315-P01-East and South Elevations Existing  (PDF, 1.53 MB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-320-P01-Section BB Existing  (PDF, 380 KB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-330-P01-Level 3 Mezzanine Proposed  (PDF, 871 KB, 1 page)  3716-HAR-SRA-XX-XX-DR-A-PL-331-P01-Level...
